name: nightshift
description: Coverage-driven, budget-aware assurance loop with two lanes — /nightshift:security (security review + mandatory refuter) and /nightshift:design (designer/UX). v2.1 adds a deterministic TypeScript core (bin/select·dedupe·record·rollup·validate + a read-only guard hook) that owns every checkable behavior, orchestrated by a thin Workflow shell on subscription billing. Built once as an engine; each codebase onboarded as a .nightshift/ pack.
